Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)

Flash (You may cast this spell any time you could cast an instant.)

Enchant creature

matchSetupRules.spellDeckRule: All nonland cards from the two selected archetypes.
matchSetupRules.landDeckRule: All basic land cards from the two selected archetypes.

notes.ward: Custom rule: Ward is a mandatory additional cost.
notes.menace: Custom rule: A creature with menace can't be blocked if the defending opponent has exactly one creature in defense position.
notes.untapStep: The untap step is part of final cleanup.
